name: Gingerbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening, brown sugar, molasses, egg white, and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, ground cinnamon, and ground ginger.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the shortening mixture; mix well.
4. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 8 hours or overnight.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Grease cookie sheets.
7. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to an 1/8-inch thickness.
8. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
9. Place cookies on prepared sheets.
10. Bake for 6-8 minutes, or until edges begin to brown.
11. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks.
12. Decorate as desired.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
